notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Christian Koss pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Koss flies out to right fielder Esteury Ruiz.

notableEvents.label: Connor Norby GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Norby grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Graham Pauley out at 2nd. Connor Norby out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández pops out to first baseman Rafael Devers in foul territory.
